input.background: The probability of being blood group B is 0.08. We are interested in the probability that fewer than three pints of group B blood will be obtained if one pint of blood is taken from each of 100 unrelated blood donors.
input.question: What is the probability that fewer than three pints of group B blood will be obtained from 100 unrelated blood donors?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
